gaps.practice: Leveraging Spark for distributed data processing
gaps.evidence_in_top_quartile: Arize AI and Fiddler AI both utilize Spark in their stacks.
gaps.evidence_at_prospect: PulseSight's stack does not currently include Spark.
gaps.gap_insight: Competitors in the top quartile are leveraging Spark for distributed data processing, which PulseSight does not appear to be using.
